title: Marco Visconti
writer: Mario Bonnard, Oreste Gasperini, Tommasso Grossi
actors: Carlo Ninchi, Roberto Villa, Mariella Lotti
plot: Medieval romance: Visconti, head of Milan's militia loves a noblewoman whose mother he'd courted 20 years ago, only to lose her in an arranged marriage.This time the competition is his cousin.The drama builds to a jousting tournam...
